name: Breakfast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 (8 oz.) Cartons Frozen Egg Substitute Thawed
6 Slices White Bread Cut Into 1/2 in. Cubes. Cherry Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add pork, Italian seasoning, fennel seeds, and garlic to the skillet. Cook until meat is browned and crumbled.
3. Drain the mixture in a colander and pat dry with paper towels. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine milk, shredded cheddar, chopped green onions, dry mustard, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
5. Add the pork mixture and bread to the bowl. Stir until just blended.
6. Pour the mixture into an 11 x 7 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
7. Cover and chill for 8 to 12 hours.
8. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 50 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
9. Garnish with tomatoes and green onion tops if desired.
